module.name: Jointtechs Connector
module.description: Jointtechs PBX agent for read-only discovery, CDR/recording sync, live channel status, diagnostics, playback, and approved framework updates.
module.changelog: *1.0.8* Reinstall the automatic sync cron from heartbeat/config flows so calls keep syncing without manual resync. *1.0.7* Add an approved read-only Asterisk active-channel probe for the live wallboard. *1.0.6* Add SIP/PJSIP endpoint registration status for the live wallboard. *1.0.5* Add approved temporary extension call forwarding from the portal. *1.0.4* Include extension voicemail, follow-me, and call-forwarding inventory metadata. *1.0.3* Fall back to the standard asteriskcdrdb database when FreePBX leaves CDRDBNAME empty, and return sanitized action errors for diagnostics. *1.0.2* Let the public action endpoint load the connector class directly when FreePBX BMO lookup is unavailable, and install scheduled outbound call/recording sync. *1.0.1* Install a public signed action shim for portal-triggered work when FreePBX blocks module PHP and authenticated AJAX. *1.0.0* Add stable signed agent task runner, auto-registration, broad read discovery, dynamic CDR sync, deep recording discovery, log/file diagnostics, and signed self-update path. *0.3.1* Add signed recording fetch action for temporary portal playback/download cache. *0.3.0* Auto-register with the Jointtechs portal on install/config load, discover PBX metadata, and allow Jointtechs to assign the PBX to a customer later. *0.2.2* Simplify pairing to pairing-code-first, auto-detect PBX public URL, default portal URL, and route signed portal actions through FreePBX ajax.php. *0.2.1* Read recent FreePBX CDR rows, map native CDR fields, send recording paths, and make CLI sync workers functional. *0.2.0* Add signed inbound read-only actions for portal-triggered heartbeat, sync, recording metadata refresh, and recording streaming. *0.1.2* Fix install/uninstall returns, use FreePBX module config storage, sanitize AJAX pairing errors, and render pairing results inline. *0.1.1* Implement real HTTPS pairing and move AJAX handlers into the main module class. *0.1.0* Initial read-only pairing, heartbeat, CDR sync, and recording metadata sync scaffold.
